nodes.label: drizzle.config.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM config pointing at lib/db/schema.ts with PostgreSQL dialect and local db credentials.

nodes.label: list_models.js
nodes.summary: Standalone script that queries SiliconFlow API to list available DeepSeek models.

nodes.label: next.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Next.js config that imports dns-patch.mjs before exporting an otherwise empty config object.

nodes.label: lib/dns-patch.mjs
nodes.summary: DNS patching module loaded at Next.js startup to fix DNS resolution issues.

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for IntelliRender Next.js app with Vercel AI SDK, Drizzle ORM, MCP SDK, Three.js, and Shadcn UI dependencies.

nodes.label: .vscode/settings.json
nodes.summary: VSCode workspace settings configuring Live Server port to 5501.

nodes.label: app/layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root Next.js layout with dark mode classes and metadata titled 'Visual Response Engine'.

nodes.label: app/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Root page component managing active chat state and rendering Sidebar alongside ChatWindow.

nodes.label: app/api/chat/route.ts
nodes.summary: Standard (non-streaming) chat POST endpoint that uses a two-step LLM decision+generation pipeline to return text or widget responses.

nodes.label: app/api/chat/agent/route.ts
nodes.summary: Agentic streaming chat POST endpoint using streamText with tool use (render_widget, web_search, think) and dynamic MCP server integration.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/route.ts
nodes.summary: GET/POST endpoint for listing all chats ordered by createdAt and creating new chats.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/route.ts
nodes.summary: DELETE endpoint for removing a chat by ID.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/messages/route.ts
nodes.summary: GET endpoint that fetches all messages for a given chat ID ordered ascending by ID.

nodes.label: app/api/chats/[id]/title/route.ts
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that uses generateText to generate a 4-word AI title for a chat and persists it.

nodes.label: app/api/messages/[id]/route.ts
nodes.summary: DELETE endpoint that rewinds conversation by deleting a message and all subsequent messages in the same chat.

nodes.label: components/Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Sidebar component listing recent chats, managing MCP server configuration stored in localStorage, and allowing new chat creation.

nodes.label: components/chat/ChatWindow.tsx
nodes.summary: Main chat UI managing standard and agent modes, message state, @mention skill system, and streaming via Vercel AI SDK useChat.

nodes.label: components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders individual chat messages with markdown, syntax highlighting, tool invocation displays, and embedded widget rendering.

nodes.label: components/widgets/HtmlCanvas.tsx
nodes.summary: Widget component that renders AI-generated HTML in a sandboxed iframe with preview/code toggle and collapse controls.

nodes.label: lib/ai.ts
nodes.summary: AI model provider helper exporting getModel() used by API routes.

nodes.label: lib/db
nodes.summary: Drizzle database client instance exported as db.

nodes.label: lib/db/schema.ts
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM schema defining chats and messages tables.

nodes.label: types/widget.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript types and Zod schemas for widget types (ChatMessage, HtmlCanvasParams, GravityParamsSchema, KanbanParamsSchema, DashboardParamsSchema).

nodes.label: lib/skills.ts
nodes.summary: BUILTIN_SKILLS and Skill type definitions for the @mention/skill system in ChatWindow.

nodes.label: components/widgets/WidgetRenderer
nodes.summary: Top-level widget dispatcher that selects appropriate widget component based on widget type.

nodes.label: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
nodes.summary: MCP SDK providing Client and StdioClientTransport used to connect to external MCP tool servers.

nodes.label: ai (Vercel AI SDK)
nodes.summary: Vercel AI SDK providing generateText, streamText, tool, convertToModelMessages, DefaultChatTransport.

nodes.label: @ai-sdk/react
nodes.summary: React bindings for Vercel AI SDK, provides useChat hook used in ChatWindow.

nodes.label: DECISION_PROMPT
nodes.summary: System prompt instructing IntelliRender AI to classify responses as text/gravity/kanban/dashboard/html-canvas.

nodes.label: HTML_GEN_PROMPT
nodes.summary: System prompt for standalone HTML document generation used in the html-canvas second-pass generation step.

nodes.label: SYSTEM_PROMPT (agent)
nodes.summary: System prompt for the agentic route instructing use of render_widget, web_search, and think tools sequentially.

nodes.label: render_widget tool
nodes.summary: AI tool that dispatches chart/kanban/dashboard/table/html-canvas widget rendering within the agent loop.

nodes.label: web_search tool
nodes.summary: AI tool calling Exa API (requires EXA_API_KEY) for real-time web search within the agent loop.

nodes.label: think tool
nodes.summary: AI tool for internal chain-of-thought reasoning before complex multi-step actions.

nodes.label: MCP Configuration Modal
nodes.summary: UI modal for configuring, enabling/disabling, and deleting local MCP stdio servers, persisted to localStorage.

nodes.label: Built-in Memory MCP Server
nodes.summary: Default MCP server pre-configured as 'npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory', always present in localStorage.

nodes.label: Agent Mode Toggle
nodes.summary: UI toggle in ChatWindow switching between Standard (fetch-based) and Agent Loop (streamText/useChat-based) chat modes.

edges.note: RootLayout wraps page children in Next.js app router
import { messages as messagesTable, chats } from '@/lib/db/schema'
DECISION_PROMPT passed as system to generateText step 1
HTML_GEN_PROMPT passed as system to generateText step 2 for html-canvas
import { messages as messagesTable, chats } from '@/lib/db/schema'
import { streamText, tool, convertToModelMessages, jsonSchema } from 'ai'
render_widget tool defined and passed to streamText
web_search tool defined calling Exa API
showMcpModal state controls MCP Configuration Modal rendering
Default MCP server object hardcoded in useEffect initialization
<MessageBubble> rendered per message in message list
useChat transport api: '/api/chat/agent' in agent mode
Agent mode toggle buttons in input area footer
Drizzle client needs schema for typed queries
Depends on drizzle-orm and pg packages

hyperedges.relation: All three routes call getModel() from lib/ai to obtain the LLM model instance
All API routes share lib/db (Drizzle client) and lib/db/schema as the persistence layer
Chat list CRUD: Sidebar fetches and deletes chats; ChatWindow creates them via the standard/agent API routes returning chatId
Three dynamic tools registered together in the agent route's dynamicTools object and passed to streamText
HtmlCanvas is one of the widget components dispatched by WidgetRenderer and displayed inside MessageBubble
MCP server config flows from localStorage (managed in Sidebar/mcp-modal) into ChatWindow's useChat body, and then into the agent route for dynamic tool registration
Two-pass prompt pipeline in standard chat route: DECISION_PROMPT classifies intent, HTML_GEN_PROMPT generates html-canvas content
